Clients from these zip codes are able to shop at the pantry once per week. Our program is located at the old Broome Middle School. Sign up genius link is here: https://www.signupgenius.com/go/9040F4FAAA923A64-53967452-iwfp If it is your first time shopping with them, please arrive 10 minutes before your appointment to be registered into our system and to bring the following information: – An ID with their name and pictures on it. (Examples: Passport, Driving License, Birth Certificate, Government ID) – Valid proof of Address – Proof of Low Income (Examples: SNAP. EBT, FARMS, Medicaid, WIC) – An ID of all the members in their household (Examples: Passport, Driving License, Birth Certificate, Government ID) Also available: Diapers, baby formula This hub is co-located with our Clothing Center (that provides free clothing to Montgomery County) and an Emergency Financial Assistance Program (Rental Assistance& Utilities) Alternative phone number: 301-905-6123 Please check their website for closures/weather-related events.
